# ToolsML - AI Tools Directory

## Purpose
ToolsML is a comprehensive directory featuring 1000+ curated AI tools across 200+ categories. We help users discover, compare, and choose the right AI solutions for their needs.

## Categories
- AI Writing & Content Generation
- Image Generation & Design
- Video Editing & Production
- Developer Tools & Code Assistants
- Chatbots & Conversational AI
- Machine Learning Platforms
- Audio & Music Generation
- Business & Productivity Tools
- Marketing & SEO Automation
- Document Processing & OCR
- Research & Data Analytics
- Creative & Design Tools

## Features
- Human-curated tool reviews
- Detailed pricing comparisons
- Feature breakdowns and specifications
- User ratings and reviews
- Advanced filtering and search
- Weekly updates with new tools
- Category-based browsing
- Tool comparison functionality

## Content
All tools in our directory include:
- Comprehensive descriptions
- Pricing models (Free, Freemium, Paid)
- Key features and capabilities
- User reviews and ratings
- Company information
- Use case examples
- Pros and cons analysis

## API
For developers interested in accessing our tool data, please contact us through our website.

## Pages
- [Home](/): AI tools directory homepage with featured and trending tools.
- [Browse All Tools](/browse): Full searchable catalog of AI tools with filters.
- [Compare Tools](/compare): Side-by-side comparisons of AI tools.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles and guides about AI tools and workflows.
- [Tutorials](/tutorials): How-to guides for popular AI tools.
- [About](/about): About ToolsML and our editorial process.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the ToolsML team.
- [Submit a Tool](/submit): Add a new AI tool to the directory.
- [Advertise](/advertise): Sponsorship and promotion options.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How we handle user data.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms for using ToolsML.

## Categories
- [Writing AI Tools](/category/writing): Content generation, copywriting, editing.
- [Design AI Tools](/category/design): Image generation and design assistants.
- [Coding AI Tools](/category/coding): Code assistants and developer tools.
- [Marketing AI Tools](/category/marketing): Marketing automation and campaigns.
- [Productivity AI Tools](/category/productivity): Workflow and task automation.
- [Video AI Tools](/category/video): Video editing and generation.
- [Audio AI Tools](/category/audio): Voice, music, and speech tools.
- [Research AI Tools](/category/research): Data analysis and research assistants.
- [SEO AI Tools](/category/seo): Search optimization tools.
- [Sales AI Tools](/category/sales): Sales enablement and outreach.
- [Automation AI Tools](/category/automation): Workflow automation.
- [Data AI Tools](/category/data): Data processing and analytics.
- [Social Media AI Tools](/category/social): Social content and scheduling.

## Contact
Website: https://toolsml.com
Submit a tool: https://toolsml.com/submit
Advertise: https://toolsml.com/advertise

## Updates
Last updated: October 2025
New tools added weekly
Review data refreshed daily
